overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a beige jacket walking through a foggy urban waterfront district at night. The character descends stairs from a waterfront promenade, walks along a sidewalk past telephone booths and bus shelters, crosses a street at a crosswalk, and enters a parking lot with vintage cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with stairs overlooking water

events.description: character begins descending stairs from waterfront platform to street level

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs from a waterfront overlook, moving away from the water toward the street

entered.detail: concrete stairs with metal railings leading down from waterfront platform
black metal handrails along the stairway
tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy night sky near the water
calm water visible beyond the palm trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night at a waterfront promenade. The character stands on concrete stairs overlooking a body of water surrounded by palm trees. The character descends the stairs, moving away from the waterfront toward the street level, with metal handrails visible on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with telephone booths and bus shelters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing a telephone booth and bus shelter while following a pedestrian with an umbrella ahead

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: red and grey telephone booth on the sidewalk
covered bus stop shelter with glass panels and a bench
low-rise commercial buildings with lit windows and signage along the street
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines running along the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved urban sidewalk flanked by commercial buildings on the left and a foggy street on the right. A telephone booth and bus shelter appear on the right side of the path. The character follows a pedestrian with an umbrella walking ahead, while sparse vehicle traffic moves along the road.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
character weaves between pedestrians while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk, navigating between other pedestrians moving in various directions

notable_agents.action: woman in red top standing near the crosswalk entrance

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an intersection and steps onto a marked crosswalk to cross the street. Several other pedestrians are also crossing or waiting at the intersection. The commercial buildings recede into the distance on the left as the character moves across the wide asphalt road toward a parking lot on the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor parking lot with vintage vehicles

events.description: character enters parking lot area with parked vintage cars and a yellow van

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot between parked cars, heading toward a building with purple neon lighting

entered.detail: wet asphalt parking lot with white painted lines marking spaces
vintage yellow and white van parked in the lot
vintage sedans including a blue and white car and a grey beetle
single-story building with large windows and purple neon interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters a parking lot filled with vintage parked cars including a distinctive yellow van. The ground is wet asphalt reflecting the streetlights. The character walks between the parked vehicles toward a low building with purple neon lighting visible through the windows, while trees line the far edge of the lot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy waterfront promenade down into a neon-lit urban parking lot. It begins with the character descending concrete stairs away from the water and palm trees, moving from the elevated promenade toward the street level. As the character reaches the sidewalk, the scene shifts to a paved urban corridor flanked by commercial buildings, passing a telephone booth and bus shelter while following a pedestrian with an umbrella. The camera then tracks the character across a marked intersection and wide asphalt road, leaving the buildings behind as they move toward the opposite side of the street. Finally, the movement leads into a wet parking lot filled with vintage cars and a yellow van, ending as the character walks toward a low building glowing with purple neon light.
